false_positives.description: js-yaml 3.14.2 is the PATCHED version that fixes CVE-2025-64718, not a vulnerable version. The vulnerability affects versions <3.14.2 and 4.0.0-4.1.0.
false_positives.detection_pattern: Alert triggered for js-yaml 3.14.2 prototype pollution
false_positives.resolution: Verify version is 3.14.2 or 4.1.1+ - these are secure
